queries.question: Which software developers and data analysts have a middle grade?
queries.sql:
SELECT Software_Developers.name
FROM Software_Developers
WHERE Software_Developers.grade = "Middle"
UNION
SELECT Data_Analysts.name
FROM Data_Analysts
WHERE Data_Analysts.grade = "Middle"

queries.question: List all software developers and also show middle data analysts.
queries.sql:
SELECT Software_Developers.name
FROM Software_Developers
UNION
SELECT Data_Analysts.name
FROM Data_Analysts
WHERE Data_Analysts.grade = "Middle"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display middle data analysts and software developers.
